title: He Knows
description: EntityWatcher is a slow-building ARG-style Minecraft datapack that subtly distorts reality and behavior to make players feel watched, followed, and known. .... . .-.. .--.
body:
EntityWatcher is a creeping nightmare woven into Minecraft’s world—an unseen presence watching, waiting, twisting reality. Entities twitch with unnatural intent, leaving behind clues only the keenest can decipher.

Listen closely to the ambient whispers;

..-. . .- .-. / .. ... / .- .-.. .-- .- -.-- ...

Uifsf jt b tfdsfu dpoufou xjuipvu uif xbz ju bsf pg wfsz.

Only the brave will unravel these messages — secrets buried in dots and dashes, and letters shifted by a simple cipher. Can you break the code before the watcher breaks you?
